source_items.text: Add your own encouragement, but never insist that a client attend.
Ask your client for reasons why having additional support could be helpful (invoke self-motivational statements).
Consider specific steps to help your client get to meetings.
When you go to this particular meeting, you will probably find that it starts with a time of silence, followed by the serenity prayer.
You will probably feel more a part of the meeting, though, if you say something about why you are there and what has been happening.
